def negative_string_sentinel_values_duplicated_instead_of_constant_or_enum():
    rule_id = "string_sentinel_values_duplicated_instead_of_constant_or_enum"
    family = "maintainability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flag repeated mode or status strings that should be centralized."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
